stemHtml: An aeroplane leaving ground effect after take-off will experience a(n) (1) _____ in upwash, require a(n) (2) _____ of the AoA to maintain lift. It will also experience a(n) (3) _____ in downwash over the horizontal stabiliser and require a (4) _____ elevator input for a given change in pitch due to the change in downwash over the horizontal stabiliser.
